name: chr5p11_pericentric_alpha_HSat
description: Chromosome 5 p-arm pericentric flank (5p11-5p13), the immediate sub-centromeric LCR shoreline on the p-side of the chr5 centromere. Alpha-satellite (D5Z2), pericentromeric SDs and HSat patches. Distally adjoins the 5p13 SMN-region-flanking SDs. Resolved in T2T-CHM13.

architecture.internal_structure: alpha-sat HOR + HSat patches + Horvath/She pericentromeric SD shoreline.
